mapper.select: select sys_id , link_sys_id , original_file_nm , convert_file_nm , file_ext , mime_type , file_size , file_path from attach_file af where 1=1 and link_sys_id = #{sysId} and delete_yn = 'N' order by ord_no
mapper.insert:
insert into attach_file ( sys_id , link_sys_id , original_file_nm , convert_file_nm , file_ext , mime_type , file_size , file_path , ord_no , delete_yn , insert_user_id , insert_datetime , sys_plant_cd, ) values
( #{item.sysId}, #{item.linkSysId}, #{item.originalFileNm}, #{item.convertFileNm}, #{item.fileExt}, #{item.mimeType}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.filePath}, #{item.ordNo}, 'N', #{userId}, now(), #{sysPlantCd} )

update.foreach: update attach_file set ord_no = #{item.ordNo}, modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{item.sysId}

mapper.delete:
update attach_file set delete_yn = 'Y', modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select sys_id , link_sys_id , original_file_nm , convert_file_nm , file_ext , mime_type , file_size , file_path , full_path , ord_no from attach_file af where 1=1 and sys_id in
#{item.sysId}
